# Introduction {.unnumbered}

Course on Air Quality Analysis and Management

1. [Calculating Air Quality Index (AQI)](./notebooks/Calculating_AQI.html)
2. [Plotting AQI of a City](./notebooks/Plotting_AQI_of_a_City.html)
3. [Compliance with Air Quality Standards](./notebooks/Air_Quality_Standards.html)
4. [Filling gaps with Satellite images](./notebooks/Filling_Gaps_Satellite.html)
5. [Filling gaps with Model Results](./notebooks/Filling_Gaps_Modeling.html)
6. [Source Apportionment](./notebooks/Source_Apportionment.html)
